# claudeadmin_compliance_projects (Data Source)

Lists Claude Projects (`/v1/compliance/apps/projects`). Enterprise + Compliance Access Key with scope `read:compliance_user_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_compliance_projects" "all" {}

output "top_users_by_projects" {
  value = {
    for p in data.claudeadmin_compliance_projects.all.projects :
    p.user_id => p.chat_count...
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Per-page size (default 100).
- `user_id` (String) Filter by owning user_id.

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `chat_count` (Number)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
